task_completion.description: Vital Recorder is open and the Case #6 .vital file is loaded.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Vital Recorder application window is visible on the screen, showing that a .vital file has been loaded (e.g., tracks and waveforms are displayed in the main window).

task_completion.description: The agent reviews the vital sign tracks within Vital Recorder to determine their durations.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The agent is seen interacting with the track list, track properties, or time axes in the Vital Recorder GUI to inspect the durations of the various tracks.

task_completion.description: A text file named shortest_track_report.txt is created in the Documents folder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor (e.g., Notepad) is open, and the window title or a 'Save As' dialog confirms the file is being saved as 'shortest_track_report.txt' in the 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents' directory.

task_completion.description: The report contains the correct case number and shortest track name.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text editor displays the lines 'Case: 6' and 'Shortest Track: [Track Name]', where the track name is 'BIS/SR', 'BIS/SEF', or 'BIS/TOTPOW'.

task_completion.description: The report contains the correct durations and coverage percentage.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text editor displays 'Duration (minutes): 58', 'Total Case Duration (minutes): 86', and 'Coverage Percentage: 67%'.

integrity.description: The agent used the Vital Recorder GUI to inspect the file, rather than using Python or command-line tools to extract the data.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Vital Recorder application open and being interacted with to find the shortest track, not just a terminal running a script to parse the .vital file.

integrity.description: The agent typed or pasted the report into a text editor rather than generating it entirely via a script.
integrity.visual_evidence: A text editor (like Notepad) is used to compose the report, rather than a terminal window showing a script outputting the file directly to the destination.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The correct shortest tracks for Case 6 are 'BIS/SR', 'BIS/SEF', and 'BIS/TOTPOW'. The correct rounded track duration is 58 minutes. The correct rounded total case duration is 86 minutes. The correct rounded coverage percentage is 67%. The report must be saved at C:\Users\Docker\Documents\shortest_track_report.txt.
